title: Publish to web is disabled or restricted to a security group

evidence.reason: Setting is enabled for the entire organization with no security group scoping.

recommendation: Tenant setting "Publish to web" is disabled or restricted to a specific security group.

title: Export data is restricted to a security group

evidence.reason: Setting is disabled (effectively scoped to no one).

recommendation: Tenant setting "Export data" is restricted to a security group, not enabled tenant-wide.

title: Users can create Fabric items is scoped to a security group

evidence.reason: Enabled but scoped to 1 security group(s).

recommendation: "Users can create Fabric items" is scoped to a specific security group, not enabled for the entire organization.

title: Service principals can use Fabric APIs is enabled and scoped

evidence.reason: Enabled and scoped to 1 security group(s).

recommendation: "Service principals can use Fabric APIs" is enabled and scoped to an automation security group (required for this assessment and for CI/CD).

title: External data sharing is disabled or scoped to a security group

evidence.reason: Setting is enabled for the entire organization with no security group scoping.

recommendation: External sharing tenant settings ("Allow sharing to external users", "Invite external users to your organization") are disabled or scoped to a security group. Tenant-wide external sharing is a major data-exfiltration vector.

title: Uncertified / custom visuals are restricted to a security group

evidence.reason: Enabled but scoped to 1 security group(s).

recommendation: Uncertified / custom visuals tenant settings are scoped. Allowing arbitrary visuals tenant-wide opens an unreviewed code-execution surface inside reports.

title: R / Python visuals and scripts are restricted to a security group

evidence.reason: Setting is disabled (effectively scoped to no one).

recommendation: R and Python visual / script settings are scoped or disabled. R/Python visuals run arbitrary code; tenant-wide enablement bypasses code review.
